title: Red Light District Shark Attack
overview: Amsterdam - a city known for its wild debauchery, legal sex and drugs, and sharks?! When sex and drug obsessed Tommy takes a trip to Amsterdam to visit a brothel in the Red Light District, he tries the newest experimental drug available on the black market that turns him into a HALF MAN, HALF SHARK, FULL ON KILLING MACHINE! Will the ladies of the brothel survive the night? Hope ya’ got your rubbers!
